parameters.query:
INSERT INTO users (telegram_id, telegram_username, first_name)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
ON CONFLICT (telegram_id) DO UPDATE
SET last_active_at = NOW(),
    telegram_username = EXCLUDED.telegram_username
RETURNING id, telegram_id, language, credits_remaining, is_admin, is_active;

parameters.text:
⛔ Votre compte n'est pas actif.
Contactez l'administrateur.

⛔ Your account is not active.
Contact the administrator.

=🤖 *Bonjour {{ $('Extract User Info').item.json.first_name }} !*

Je suis votre Assistant d'Analyse de Documents et Données.

📄 Je peux analyser : PDF · DOCX · Excel · CSV
📊 Je génère des rapports détaillés avec graphiques
🌍 Je parle français et anglais

*Choisissez votre langue / Choose your language :*

parameters.query:
UPDATE users
SET language = $1, last_active_at = NOW()
WHERE telegram_id = $2
RETURNING id, language, credits_remaining;

parameters.text:
=✅ *Langue française sélectionnée !*

💳 Crédits disponibles : {{ $('Save Language DB').item.json.credits_remaining }}

📎 *Envoyez votre fichier pour commencer l'analyse*
Formats supportés : PDF · DOCX · Excel (.xlsx) · CSV

Taille maximum : 15 MB

=✅ *English selected!*

Supported formats: PDF · DOCX · Excel (.xlsx) · CSV

Maximum size: 15 MB

=❌ *Fichier trop volumineux*

Taille : {{ $json.file_size_mb }} MB
Maximum autorisé : 15 MB

Compressez votre fichier ou envoyez un extrait.

💳 *Crédits épuisés*

Vous n'avez plus de crédits d'analyse.
Contactez l'administrateur pour en obtenir davantage.

/admin pour info contact

=❌ *Format non supporté*

Format détecté : {{ $json.mime_type }}

Formats acceptés :
📄 PDF (.pdf)
📝 Word (.docx, .doc)
📊 Excel (.xlsx, .xls)
📋 CSV (.csv)

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO sessions (user_id, chat_id, status, file_name, file_type, file_size_bytes, extracted_preview, extracted_data)
SELECT u.id, $1::bigint, 'extracted', $2, $3, $4::integer, $5,
  convert_from(decode($6, 'base64'), 'UTF8')::jsonb
FROM users u WHERE u.telegram_id = $7::bigint
RETURNING id, session_uuid::text;

parameters.text: ={{ $json.message_text }}

⏳ Analyse en cours... / Analysis in progress...

🔍 Extraction des données / Data extraction
🤖 Interrogation de l'IA / AI processing
📊 Génération des graphiques / Chart generation

_15-30 secondes / seconds..._

parameters.query:
SELECT s.id, s.file_name, s.file_type, s.file_size_bytes,
 s.extracted_data::text AS extracted_data_raw,
 u.language, u.telegram_id, s.chat_id
FROM sessions s
JOIN users u ON u.id = s.user_id
WHERE s.id = $1
LIMIT 1

parameters.text: ={{ $json.report_message }}

parameters.query: UPDATE sessions SET status = 'completed', analysis_type = 'auto', llm_used = $1, llm_response = convert_from(decode($2, 'base64'), 'UTF8')::jsonb, llm_response_time_ms = $3::integer, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $4::integer

parameters.text: ={{ $json.language === 'FR' ? '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\nQue souhaitez-vous faire ?' : '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\nWhat would you like to do?' }}
=={{ $json.user_prompt }}

messageValues.message: Tu es un expert data analyst. Tu réponds UNIQUEMENT en JSON valide, sans markdown, sans explication, sans reasoning. Retourne seulement le JSON demandé, rien avant, rien après.

parameters.query:
UPDATE sessions
SET conversation_state = 'idle',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE chat_id = $1
  AND conversation_state LIKE 'awaiting_%'

parameters.text:
❌ Analyse annulée. / Analysis cancelled.

Vous pouvez envoyer un nouveau fichier à tout moment.
You can send a new file at any time.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  s.id               AS session_id,
  s.session_uuid,
  s.conversation_state,
  s.current_question,
  s.custom_answers,
  s.file_type,
  s.file_name,
  s.extracted_preview,
  s.extracted_data,
  u.language
FROM sessions s
JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id
WHERE s.chat_id = $1
  AND s.conversation_state LIKE 'awaiting_%'
ORDER BY s.created_at DESC
LIMIT 1

parameters.jsCode:
const session = $input.first().json;
const msgData = $('Extract Message Data').first().json;
return [{ json: {
  session_id:         session.session_id,
  session_uuid:       session.session_uuid,
  conversation_state: session.conversation_state,
  current_question:   session.current_question,
  custom_answers:     session.custom_answers || {},
  file_type:          session.file_type,
  file_name:          session.file_name,
  extracted_preview:  session.extracted_preview,
  extracted_data:     session.extracted_data,
  language:           session.language || 'FR',
  chat_id:            msgData.chat_id,
  user_text:          msgData.text,
  first_name:         msgData.first_name
} }];

parameters.text: ={{ $json.error_msg }}

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { session_id: data.session_id, chat_id: data.chat_id, language: data.language, new_answer_json: JSON.stringify({ q1: data.user_text }), new_state: 'awaiting_q2', new_question: 2 } }];

parameters.query:
UPDATE sessions
SET custom_answers     = custom_answers || $1::jsonb,
    current_question   = $2,
    conversation_state = $3,
    updated_at         = NOW()
WHERE id = $4

parameters.text:

Quelles colonnes ou sections vous intéressent particulièrement ?

_(Exemple : ventes, date, région, nom produit)_' }}

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: {
  session_id:       data.session_id,
  chat_id:          data.chat_id,
  language:         data.language,
  new_answer_json:  JSON.stringify({ q5: data.user_text }),
  new_state:        'processing_custom',
  new_question:     5,
  custom_answers:   data.custom_answers,
  file_type:        data.file_type,
  file_name:        data.file_name,
  extracted_data:   data.extracted_data,
  extracted_preview: data.extracted_preview
} }];

parameters.query:
UPDATE sessions
SET custom_answers     = custom_answers || $1::jsonb,
    current_question   = $2,
    conversation_state = $3,
    analysis_type      = 'custom',
    updated_at         = NOW()
WHERE id = $4

parameters.text:
={{ $('Save Q5 Set Processing').first().json.language === 'ENG' ? '⚙️ *Personalized analysis in progress...*

Your 5 answers have been recorded. The AI is generating your customized report.

_This may take 30 to 120 seconds._' : '⚙️ *Analyse personnalisée en cours...*

Vos 5 réponses ont été enregistrées. L'IA génère votre rapport personnalisé.

_Cela peut prendre 30 à 120 secondes._' }}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  s.id               AS session_id,
  s.custom_answers,
  s.file_type,
  s.file_name,
  s.extracted_data,
  s.extracted_preview,
  s.file_size_bytes,
  u.language,
  u.first_name
FROM sessions s
JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id
WHERE s.id = $1

parameters.text: =={{ $json.user_prompt }}

messageValues.message: You are a data analysis API. Your ENTIRE response must be a single valid JSON object. Start with { and end with }. Absolutely no markdown, no explanations, no text before or after the JSON.

parameters.query:
UPDATE sessions
SET status             = 'completed',
    conversation_state = 'idle',
    llm_used           = 'ollama_kimi',
    analysis_type      = 'custom',
    llm_response       = convert_from(decode($1, 'base64'), 'UTF8')::jsonb,
    updated_at         = NOW()
WHERE id = $2::integer

parameters.text:
={{ $('Format Custom Report').first().json.language === 'ENG' ? '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
✅ *Analysis complete!*

What would you like to do next?' : '━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
✅ *Analyse terminée !*

Que souhaitez-vous faire maintenant ?' }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE sessions
  SET conversation_state = 'awaiting_custom',
      current_question   = 1,
      analysis_type      = 'custom',
      updated_at         = NOW()
  WHERE id = $1

parameters.text:
={{ $('Setup Custom Mode').first().json.language === 'ENG'   ? '🎯 *Custom Analysis — 5 questions*

I will ask you 5 quick questions to tailor the analysis to your needs.

*Question 1/5*
What is the main goal of this analysis?

_(Example: identify sales trends, analyze team performance)_

_Type /cancel at any time to abort._'   : '🎯 *Analyse Personnalisée — 5 questions*

Je vais vous poser 5 questions rapides pour adapter l'analyse à vos besoins.

*Question 1/5*
Quel est l'objectif principal de cette analyse ?

_(Exemple : identifier les tendances de vente, analyser la performance d'équipe)_

_Tapez /cancel à tout moment pour annuler._' }}
